title: DCPT LET result manifest
description: Per-plan, per-code result manifest. One file per data/<code>/results/<plan>/ directory. Plan directory names are the primary cross-code alignment key; filenames inside may differ between codes.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump when the format changes incompatibly.

plan.description: Plan directory name. Must match the parent directory of this manifest. Identical across all MC codes.

name.description: Full display name of the MC code.

short.description: Short identifier matching the data/<short>/ directory name.

version.description: Code version string used for these results.

notes.description: Optional free-text notes about the code configuration or known limitations.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the simulation was run.

input_path.description: Relative path to the input directory used, from the repository root.

runner.description: User or system identifier that ran the simulation.

git_ref.description: Git ref or commit hash of the input state used.

n_primaries.description: Number of primary particles simulated. Strongly recommended; omit only when genuinely unknown.

normalization.description: Normalization convention for output quantities, e.g. 'per_primary'.

runtime_seconds.description: Total wallclock runtime in seconds, if known.

capabilities.description: Maps semantic_id strings to availability. true = available, false = intentionally absent or unsupported. An object form allows adding notes. Omitting an id means availability is unknown.

outputs.description: Output entries. Each entry maps one or more local files to a semantic description. Files with no cross-code equivalent (raw outputs, preview images) use semantic_id: null.

semantic_id.description: Cross-code matching key. Null for raw code outputs and preview images that have no counterpart in other codes.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this output represents.

quantity.description: Physical quantity scored (e.g. FLUENCE, DOSE, DLET, TLET, DQEFF, TQEFF).

medium.description: Scoring medium (e.g. 'silicon', 'water'). Null when not applicable.

differential_axis.description: For differential spectra: the quantity on the x-axis (the variable being differentiated).

axis_x.description: For profile data: x-axis quantity and unit.

axis_y.description: For profile data: y-axis quantity and unit.

role.description: primary_data: direct simulation output. derived: post-processed from primary_data (e.g. spectra computed from raw fluence). raw_output: code-native format file. preview_image: rendered visualization.

files.description: File paths relative to this manifest's directory.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this output entry, e.g. how derived outputs were produced.
